Hero.description: We scan flights from your airports 24/7 and alert you when prices drop by 30% or more. Book in one click.

feature1.title: Up to -80% on your flights
feature1.description: We track price drops continuously. As soon as the fare drops, you're the first to know.

feature2.title: Instant alerts
feature2.description: Push notification as soon as a flight drops below -30%. Before the deal disappears.

feature3.title: All prices in one place
feature3.description: We compare fares from the biggest platforms in real time. Get the best deal without opening 10 sites.

home.title: Yoopi - Travel more. Pay less.
home.description: Yoopi scans flights from your airports 24/7 and alerts you when prices drop. Book in one click.
home.keywords: cheap flights, flight alerts, travel deals, plane tickets, flight promotions

terms.title: Terms of Sale - Yoopi
terms.description: Terms of Sale for the Yoopi application

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Yoopi
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for the Yoopi application

support.title: Support - Yoopi
support.description: Need help with Yoopi? Check our FAQ or contact us.

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account - Yoopi
deleteAccount.description: Delete your Yoopi account and all your personal data.

section1.title: 1. Purpose
section1.content1: These Terms of Sale (hereinafter "Terms") govern the use of the Yoopi mobile application (hereinafter "the Application") published by Yoopi (hereinafter "we", "our", "us").
section1.content2: The Application is a flight deal detection and alert service. It compares flight prices in real time and notifies users when an abnormally low fare is detected.
section1.content3: By using the Application, you accept these Terms without reservation.

section2.title: 2. Access to the service
items: A compatible mobile device (iOS or Android)
Creating a user account (email address required)
section2.content: Users agree to provide accurate information during registration and to maintain the confidentiality of their login credentials.

section3.title: 3. Plans and pricing
freeItems: Limited access: offer details and booking links are reserved for Premium subscribers
premiumItems: Full access to offer details and booking links
Priority access to deals (1 hour ahead)
section3.pricingNote: Prices are shown in euros including VAT. They may be displayed in other currencies for indicative purposes.

section4.title: 4. Payment terms
section4.content: Payments are processed exclusively through the App Store (Apple) or Google Play Store (Google), depending on your device. No payment is processed directly by Yoopi.
section4.renewalContent1: The monthly subscription (€19.99/month) renews automatically. Your account is charged within 24 hours before the end of the current period, at the chosen subscription rate.
section4.renewalContent2: The lifetime subscription (€79.99) is a one-time purchase with no renewal.
section4.cancelIntro: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period (you retain access until that date).
cancelAndroidItems: Open Google Play Store > Menu > Subscriptions
section4.refundNote: Refund requests must be addressed directly to Apple or Google, in accordance with their respective policies.

section5.title: 5. Right of withdrawal
section5.content1: In accordance with Article L.221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to purchases of digital content not supplied on a tangible medium whose execution has begun with the consumer's agreement.
section5.content2: Refund requests must be addressed directly to Apple or Google, in accordance with their respective policies.

section6.title: 6. Content and deals
section6.intro: Flight prices displayed in the Application are provided for informational purposes and come from third-party sources (airlines and booking platforms).
disclaimerItems: The accuracy or availability of displayed prices
The availability of flights at the time of booking
The maintenance of so-called "error fares" by airlines
section6.note: Prices may change between the time of detection and booking. Users are advised to verify the final price directly on the booking platform.

section7.title: 7. Intellectual property
section7.content1: All elements of the Application (brand, logo, text, graphics, software) are the exclusive property of Yoopi or its partners and are protected by intellectual property laws.
section7.content2: Any unauthorized reproduction, representation, or exploitation is prohibited.

section8.title: 8. Liability
section8.content1: Yoopi acts as an information intermediary and does not sell airline tickets.
section8.content2: By clicking on a booking link, the user is redirected to a third-party partner platform (via affiliate links). The transaction takes place directly between the user and said platform.
section8.disclaimerIntro: Yoopi shall not be held liable for:
disclaimerItems: The terms of sale applied by partner platforms
Cancellations, modifications, or issues related to a booking
Any temporary interruption of the service

section9.title: 9. Personal data
section9.content: The processing of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, accessible from the Application. For any questions regarding your data, contact us at contact@yoopi-app.com

section10.title: 10. Changes to Terms
section10.content1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication in the Application.
section10.content2: Continued use of the Application after modification constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
section10.content3: In the event of a substantial modification, users will be notified by notification or email.

section11.title: 11. Governing law
section11.content1: These Terms are governed by French law.
section11.content2: In the event of a dispute, the parties shall endeavor to find an amicable solution. Failing that, the competent French courts shall have jurisdiction.
section11.content3: In accordance with the provisions of the French Consumer Code, users may use the consumer mediation service free of charge.

section12.title: 12. Contact
section12.content: For any questions regarding these Terms, contact us at:

section13.title: 13. Legal notices
items: Registered office: 48 rue d'Aligre, 75012 Paris, France
Host: Supabase Inc. — 970 Toa Payoh North #07-11, Singapore 318992

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.content: Yoopi ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information when you use our mobile application ("the Application").

section2.title: 2. Information We Collect
items2: Application usage data (pages viewed, features used)
Device information (model, operating system, unique identifiers)
Approximate location data (country, region) based on IP address

section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
items: Send you price alerts and relevant notifications
Communicate with you regarding your account or our services

section4.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
section4.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with the following providers, strictly necessary for the operation of the service:

providers.title: Supabase (Supabase Inc.):
providers.content: database hosting, user account authentication, secure data storage

providers.title: Tenjin (Tenjin Inc.):
providers.content: marketing attribution analytics and advertising campaign performance measurement

providers.title: Google Sign-In (Google LLC):
providers.content: authentication via your Google account, when you choose this sign-in method

providers.title: Apple Sign-In (Apple Inc.):
providers.content: authentication via your Apple ID, when you choose this sign-in method

otherItems.title: Legal obligations:
otherItems.content: if required by law or to protect our rights

otherItems.title: Business transfer:
otherItems.content: in case of merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

section5.title: 5. Data Security
section5.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.

section6.title: 6. Data Retention
section6.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with our legal obligations. You may request deletion of your account and data at any time.

section7.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
section7.intro: In accordance with GDPR and applicable laws, you have the following rights:

items.title: Right of access:
items.content: obtain a copy of your personal data

items.title: Right to portability:
items.content: receive your data in a structured format

items.title: Right to object:
items.content: object to the processing of your data

items.title: Right to withdraw consent:
items.content: at any time for consent-based processing

section7.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at

section8.title: 8. California Residents' Rights (CCPA)
section8.intro: If you reside in California, the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) grants you additional rights:

items.title: Right to know:
items.content: you may request what personal data we collect, use, and share

items.title: Right to deletion:
items.content: you may request the deletion of your personal data

items.title: Right to opt-out of sale:
items.content: we do not sell your personal data to third parties

items.title: Non-discrimination:
items.content: we will not penalize you for exercising your CCPA rights

section8.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at

section9.title: 9. Cookies and Similar Technologies
section9.content: The Application may use tracking technologies to improve your experience. You can manage your preferences in the Application settings.

section10.title: 10. International Transfers
section10.content: Your information may be transferred and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data.

section11.title: 11. Minors
section11.content: The Application is not intended for persons under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.

section12.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
section12.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by notification in the Application or by email.

section13.title: 13. Contact
section13.content: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

DeleteAccount.title: Delete my account
DeleteAccount.description: Enter your credentials to permanently delete your Yoopi account and all your data.
DeleteAccount.confirmMessage: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted, including your preferences, alerts, and history.
DeleteAccount.successMessage: Your account and all your data have been deleted.
DeleteAccount.errorDelete: An error occurred during deletion. Please try again or contact us at contact@yoopi-app.com
DeleteAccount.warning: Warning: this action is permanent and irreversible.

Support.title: Support
Support.subtitle: Have a question? We're here to help.
Support.contactText: Didn't find an answer to your question? Write to us directly.

faqs.question: How does Yoopi work?
faqs.answer: Yoopi continuously scans flight prices from your favorite airports. As soon as a price drops by 30% or more, you receive a push notification. You can then book directly with the airline in just a few clicks.

faqs.question: Is Yoopi free?
faqs.answer: The Yoopi app is free to download and use. We also offer premium features for frequent travelers.

faqs.question: How do I set up my alerts?
faqs.answer: In the app, go to "Settings" then "My airports". You can add your favorite departure airports and preferred destinations. You'll then receive personalized alerts.

faqs.question: Why did the price change when I clicked on the deal?
faqs.answer: Flight prices are very volatile and can change within minutes. We do our best to alert you as quickly as possible, but sometimes deals expire before you have time to book.

faqs.question: How do I turn off notifications?
faqs.answer: You can manage your notifications in the app settings or directly in your phone's settings. We recommend keeping notifications on so you don't miss the best deals.

faqs.question: Does Yoopi sell my data?
faqs.answer: No, we never sell your personal data. See our Privacy Policy for more details on how we protect your privacy.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: You can delete your account in the app settings or via our account deletion page on the website. You can also contact us by email to request deletion of all your data.
